expression-projection.text: RANK() OVER (PARTITION BY city ORDER BY salary DESC)
CASE WHEN a > 1 THEN b ELSE c END

aggregation-projection.expression: (amount) OVER (PARTITION BY user_id ORDER BY id ROWS BETWEEN 1 PRECEDING AND CURRENT ROW)

expression-projection.text: first_value(remark, ?) OVER (PARTITION BY user_id ORDER BY order_id)
CAST(? AS TIMESTAMP WITH LOCAL TIME ZONE)

function.text: CAST(? AS TIMESTAMP WITH LOCAL TIME ZONE)
